name: Tariq Al-Khathami
headline: Project Lead, Engineer, and Inventor at Saudi Aramco R&D Center
summary: Tariq Al-Khathami is an engineer, project leader, and recognized inventor working at the Saudi Aramco Research & Development Center. He leads advanced innovation initiatives focused on artificial intelligence, robotics, and industrial process optimization in the energy sector. His work bridges engineering, AI systems, and chemical process technologies to develop next-generation solutions for energy infrastructure and industrial operations.

current_roles.title: Project Technical Lead — AI Optimizer for Refinery PFDs
current_roles.description: Leading an AI-enabled initiative delivering early-stage process flow diagram insights and accelerating engineering decision-making across refining and chemical operations.

current_roles.title: Project Lead — AI & Robotics for Chemical Processing
current_roles.description: Leading innovation programs integrating artificial intelligence and robotics technologies to enhance chemical processing systems and energy infrastructure.

patents.title: Systems and Processes for Chemical Processing
Blinding Plug Actuation System and Related Methods
Bypassing a Portion of a Pipeline
Methods and Systems for Eroding and Preventing Deposits Within Vessels
System for Determining Conditions Within a Pipeline
System for Determining Degradation Conditions Within a Pipeline

honors.title: Saudi Aramco R&D Role Model Award
